hero.headline: Transforming organizations from the inside out.

services_preview.title: What we build together
services_preview.subtitle: We don't offer pre-packaged solutions. We design processes that respond to the real challenges of each organization.

about_preview.title: More than methodology. Real experience.
about_preview.description: Maria Ximena Santos is not a formula-based consultant. She has founded companies, led organizations, and facilitated strategic conversations in real boardrooms. Her practice comes from having lived the same challenges she now accompanies.

home_cta.title: Does your organization need to evolve?
home_cta.subtitle: Let's talk about the challenge you're facing. No formal presentations. No prior commitments.

services_page.title: Processes designed for real challenges
services_page.subtitle: Each process is designed around your organization's specific challenge. These are the capabilities Maria Ximena brings to each engagement.

about_page.title: A consultant with a story.
about_page.intro: She didn't arrive at consulting from academia. She arrived from having built companies, led organizations, and participated in board-level conversations. That makes all the difference.
about_page.certifications_title: The foundations that support the practice
about_page.philosophy_quote: The most powerful innovation doesn't come from brilliant methodologies. It comes from teams who dare to look honestly at their reality and consciously choose where they want to go.

cases_page.title: Transformations that matter.
cases_page.subtitle: Each case is different. Each organization has its own context, its own resistance, its own potential. Here's how some of these processes have unfolded.

insights_page.title: Reflections from practice.
insights_page.subtitle: Observations on innovation, leadership and organizational transformation accumulated over 20+ years of work with executive teams.
insights_page.linkedin_cta: Follow on LinkedIn for more reflections

contact_page.title: Let's talk about your challenge.
contact_page.subtitle: We don't need a formal presentation to start a relevant conversation. Tell me about the challenge your organization is facing.
contact_page.form_message_placeholder: What challenge is your organization facing? What are you trying to achieve? There's no wrong answer.
contact_page.form_success: Message sent. I'll write back soon.
